author: doll-agent
content: Parent epic complete: ~310+ NumPy functions bound across phases 0-4 + the entire long-tail follow-up sweep, F-contiguous round-trip fix landed in both ferray-numpy-interop and ferray-core (#698), CI wheel matrix configured (20 cells × 4 Python versions on Linux/macOS/Windows + sdist + OIDC trusted publishing on tag) (#690), repo-local Claude skills written for binding patterns / NumPy parity / Rust conventions (#691). 525/525 ferray-python pytest passing, cargo clippy -D warnings clean across all touched crates. Workspace bumped to 0.3.2 — ready to tag ferray-python-v0.3.2 once the PyPI pending-publisher is registered. All 23 originally-filed phase-N follow-ups (#692-#714) closed. Coverage matrix and architecture documented in ferray-python/README.md; release process documented in ferray-python/RELEASING.md.
